title: ROPE validation check kind: rmse_timeseries
description: Shape of a check's params block when check.kind == 'rmse_timeseries'. Computes RMSE of model output against a reference/truth data source over the full duration of each applicable case. `truth_ref` names a key expected in the case's data_refs map (not a path itself — the actual path is resolved per-case at runtime; whether every applicable case actually supplies that data_refs key is NOT enforced by this schema, see validation-suite.schema.json's description and tests/validation_suite_test.py::test_checks_data_refs_present_on_applicable_cases).

variable.description: Which grid variable (per docs/grid.md) this check scores. Defaults to density; uncertainty is included so a future check can validate uncertainty calibration without a schema change.

threshold.description: Optional pass/fail bound(s) on the computed RMSE value. Pass requires value <= max (when max present) AND value >= min (when min present); at least one of max/min must be present. Evaluation is performed by whatever runs the check, not by this schema.
